entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated pigeonpea (Cajanus cajan) affected by sterility mosaic disease in the Indian subcontinent

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A biotic constraint on pigeonpea caused by the Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus

entities.name: PIGEONPEA STERILITY MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: The virus that causes sterility mosaic disease in pigeonpea

entities.name: ERIOPHYID MITE
entities.description: Aceria cajani, the vector that transmits the Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographical region where sterility mosaic disease is an important constraint on pigeonpea

entities.name: BROAD-BASED RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to multiple isolates of the Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES OF PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Wild Cajanus species evaluated for broad-based resistance to sterility mosaic disease

entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea evaluated for SMD resistance

entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea evaluated for SMD resistance

entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea evaluated for SMD resistance

entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea evaluated for SMD resistance

entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea evaluated for SMD resistance

entities.name: PENINSULAR INDIA
entities.description: The region where three specific PPSMV isolates prevail

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The controlled environment used for evaluating wild Cajanus accessions

entities.name: MITE-MEDIATED VIRUS INOCULATION
entities.description: A method of virus inoculation using viruliferous eriophyid mites

entities.name: GRAFT INOCULATION

entities.name: VECTOR RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to the eriophyid mite vector which may confer resistance to PPSMV infection

entities.name: TRADITIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: The process of crossing wild relatives with cultivated pigeonpea

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
